candidate_specs.description: Current adopted package: full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the terminal micro-step only.
Earlier-control failure reference: same adopted full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the penultimate and terminal micro-steps with the full live successor handoff.
Swap only the preterminal learned/on-policy successor state z_on_next back to the cached batch-start successor.
Swap only the preterminal local-field successor state z_lf_next back to the cached batch-start successor.
Swap both preterminal successor-state handoff components z_on_next and z_lf_next back to the cached batch-start successors.

handoff_component_table.used_for: successor_state_content; becomes next-step z_on_k and therefore controls next-step on-policy rollout geometry
successor_state_content; becomes next-step z_lf_k and therefore controls next-step detached local-field feature bundle / anchor generation
current-step direction anchor extraction and psi training inputs; not swapped in this successor-state-only diagnostic
current-step regression targets only; not swapped in this successor-state-only diagnostic
